check_in_out_hours.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
check_in_out_hours.content: Check-in is from 3:00 PM and check-out is until 11:00 AM. Early check-in or late check-out may be arranged in advance with the reception, subject to availability.

parking.question: Does the hotel offer parking?
parking.content: The hotel provides parking for guests. Spaces are limited, so we recommend requesting parking in advance when booking.

wifi.question: Is WiFi available at the hotel?
wifi.content: Free WiFi is available in all rooms and common areas of the hotel. Access details are provided in the welcome materials in your room.

late_checkout.question: Can I check out later than the standard time?
late_checkout.content: Late check-out is available subject to room availability and may involve an additional fee. Please request late check-out at the reception in advance.

pets.question: Can I bring my dog or cat?
pets.content: Pets are welcome at our hotel. Please inform the reception about your pet in advance, as additional rules or fees may apply.
